allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://apis.justwatch.com/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"query { popularTitles\(country: IT, first: 3, filter: { searchQuery: \\"Fight Club\\", objectTypes: [MOVIE] }, language: it, sortBy: RELEVANCE, sortRandomSeed: 0\) { edges { node { ... on Movie { objectId content\(country: IT, language: it\) { title externalIds { tmdbId } } offers\(country: IT, platform: WEB\) { monetizationType standardWebURL package { clearName } } } } } } }"}')
